quote_en: The stock market is a device for transferring money from the impatient to the patient.
quote_cn: 股市是将钱从没有耐心的人那里转移到有耐心的人手中的装置。
author: Warren Buffett
title: CEO, Berkshire Hathaway

quote_en: Price is what you pay. Value is what you get.
quote_cn: 价格是你付出的，价值是你得到的。
author: Warren Buffett
title: CEO, Berkshire Hathaway

quote_en: It's far better to buy a wonderful company at a fair price than a fair company at a wonderful price.
quote_cn: 以合理的价格买入一家出色的公司，远胜于以出色的价格买入一家平庸的公司。
author: Warren Buffett
title: CEO, Berkshire Hathaway

quote_en: Be fearful when others are greedy and greedy when others are fearful.
quote_cn: 别人贪婪时我恐惧，别人恐惧时我贪婪。
author: Warren Buffett
title: CEO, Berkshire Hathaway

quote_en: Rule No. 1: Never lose money. Rule No. 2: Never forget Rule No. 1.
quote_cn: 第一条规则：永远不要亏钱。第二条规则：永远不要忘记第一条。
author: Warren Buffett
title: CEO, Berkshire Hathaway

quote_en: Invert, always invert. Turn a situation or problem upside down. Look at it backwards.
quote_cn: 反转，永远反转。把问题颠倒过来，从反面看待它。
author: Charlie Munger
title: Vice Chairman, Berkshire Hathaway
title_cn: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦副主席

quote_en: Show me the incentive and I'll show you the outcome.
quote_cn: 告诉我激励机制，我就能告诉你结果。
author: Charlie Munger
title: Vice Chairman, Berkshire Hathaway
title_cn: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦副主席

quote_en: The best thing a human being can do is to help another human being know more.
quote_cn: 人类所能做的最好的事，就是帮助另一个人了解更多。
author: Charlie Munger
title: Vice Chairman, Berkshire Hathaway
title_cn: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦副主席

quote_en: I never attempt to make money on the stock market. I buy on the assumption that they could close the market the next day and not reopen it for five years.
quote_cn: 我从不试图在股市上赚钱。我买入时假设他们明天就可以关闭市场，五年内不会重开。
author: Warren Buffett
title: CEO, Berkshire Hathaway

quote_en: Know what you own, and know why you own it.
quote_cn: 了解你持有什么，以及为什么持有它。
author: Peter Lynch
title: Former Manager, Magellan Fund

quote_en: The person that turns over the most rocks wins the game. And that's always been my philosophy.
quote_cn: 翻开最多石头的人赢得游戏。这一直是我的哲学。
author: Peter Lynch
title: Former Manager, Magellan Fund

quote_en: In this business if you're good, you're right six times out of ten. You're never going to be right nine times out of ten.
quote_cn: 在这行，如果你足够优秀，十次中能对六次就已经很好了。你永远不可能十次中对九次。
author: Peter Lynch
title: Former Manager, Magellan Fund

quote_en: The biggest mistake investors make is to believe that what happened in the recent past is likely to persist.
quote_cn: 投资者最大的错误，是相信近期发生的事情会持续下去。
author: Ray Dalio
title: Founder, Bridgewater Associates

quote_en: He who lives by the crystal ball will eat shattered glass.
quote_cn: 依靠水晶球生活的人，终将以碎玻璃果腹。
author: Ray Dalio
title: Founder, Bridgewater Associates

quote_en: Radical transparency and radical open-mindedness are the two tools I've found most important for making better decisions.
quote_cn: 极度透明和极度开放的心态，是我发现的对做出更好决策最重要的两个工具。
author: Ray Dalio
title: Founder, Bridgewater Associates

quote_en: Markets are not driven by fundamentals, they're driven by fear and greed.
quote_cn: 市场不是由基本面驱动的，而是由恐惧和贪婪驱动的。
author: George Soros
title: Founder, Soros Fund Management
title_cn: 索罗斯基金管理公司创始人

quote_en: It's not whether you're right or wrong that's important, but how much money you make when you're right and how much you lose when you're wrong.
quote_cn: 重要的不是你对还是错，而是你对的时候赚了多少，错的时候亏了多少。
author: George Soros
title: Founder, Soros Fund Management
title_cn: 索罗斯基金管理公司创始人

quote_en: In the short run, the market is a voting machine. In the long run, it is a weighing machine.
quote_cn: 短期内，市场是一台投票机；长期来看，它是一台称重机。
author: Benjamin Graham
title: Father of Value Investing

quote_en: The intelligent investor is a realist who sells to optimists and buys from pessimists.
quote_cn: 聪明的投资者是现实主义者，向乐观者卖出，向悲观者买入。
author: Benjamin Graham
title: Father of Value Investing

quote_en: The individual investor should act consistently as an investor and not as a speculator.
quote_cn: 个人投资者应始终如一地作为投资者而非投机者行事。
author: Benjamin Graham
title: Father of Value Investing

quote_en: The market is a pendulum that forever swings between unsustainable optimism and unjustified pessimism.
quote_cn: 市场是一个钟摆，永远在不可持续的乐观和无根据的悲观之间摆动。
author: Benjamin Graham
title: Father of Value Investing

quote_en: The goal of a successful trader is to make the best trades. Money is secondary.
quote_cn: 成功交易者的目标是做出最好的交易，金钱是次要的。
author: Jesse Livermore
title: Wall Street Legend

quote_en: There is nothing new in Wall Street. There can't be because speculation is as old as the hills.
quote_cn: 华尔街没有新鲜事，因为投机和丘陵一样古老。
author: Jesse Livermore
title: Wall Street Legend

quote_en: Men who can both be right and sit tight are uncommon.
quote_cn: 既能判断正确又能坚守仓位的人是罕见的。
author: Jesse Livermore
title: Wall Street Legend

quote_en: Bull markets are born on pessimism, grow on skepticism, mature on optimism and die on euphoria.
quote_cn: 牛市诞生于悲观，成长于怀疑，成熟于乐观，消亡于狂喜。
author: John Templeton
title: Founder, Templeton Funds

quote_en: The four most dangerous words in investing are: 'This time it's different.'
quote_cn: 投资中最危险的四个字是：'这次不一样。'
author: John Templeton
title: Founder, Templeton Funds

quote_en: The time to buy is when there's blood in the streets.
quote_cn: 当街头血流成河时，正是买入的时机。
author: Baron Rothschild
title: 18th Century Banker

quote_en: Don't fight the tape. Don't fight the Fed.
quote_cn: 不要和市场对抗。不要和美联储对抗。
author: Paul Tudor Jones
title: Founder, Tudor Investment Corp

quote_en: Losers average losers.
quote_cn: 输家越摊越输。
author: Paul Tudor Jones
title: Founder, Tudor Investment Corp

quote_en: The most important thing is to be able to distinguish between risk and uncertainty.
quote_cn: 最重要的是能够区分风险和不确定性。
author: Howard Marks
title: Co-Founder, Oaktree Capital

quote_en: You can't predict. You can prepare.
quote_cn: 你无法预测，但你可以准备。
author: Howard Marks
title: Co-Founder, Oaktree Capital

quote_en: Being too far ahead of your time is indistinguishable from being wrong.
quote_cn: 过于超前于你的时代与犯错无异。
author: Howard Marks
title: Co-Founder, Oaktree Capital

quote_en: Risk means more things can happen than will happen.
quote_cn: 风险意味着可能发生的事情比将要发生的更多。
author: Elroy Dimson
title: Finance Professor, London Business School

quote_en: Diversification is the only free lunch in investing.
quote_cn: 分散化投资是投资中唯一的免费午餐。
author: Harry Markowitz
title: Nobel Laureate in Economics

quote_en: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
quote_cn: 对知识的投资回报最丰厚。
author: Benjamin Franklin
title: Founding Father, USA

quote_en: Time is the friend of the wonderful business, the enemy of the mediocre.
quote_cn: 时间是优秀企业的朋友，是平庸企业的敌人。
author: Warren Buffett
title: CEO, Berkshire Hathaway

quote_en: Only buy something that you'd be perfectly happy to hold if the market shut down for 10 years.
quote_cn: 只买那些即使市场关闭10年你也完全愿意持有的东西。
author: Warren Buffett
title: CEO, Berkshire Hathaway

quote_en: The business schools reward difficult complex behavior more than simple behavior, but simple behavior is more effective.
quote_cn: 商学院对复杂行为的奖励多于简单行为，但简单行为更有效。
author: Warren Buffett
title: CEO, Berkshire Hathaway

quote_en: The wise man does at once what the fool does finally.
quote_cn: 智者立刻做的事，愚者最终才会去做。
author: Niccolo Machiavelli
title: Renaissance Political Thinker
title_cn: 文艺复兴时期政治思想家

quote_en: Compound interest is the eighth wonder of the world. He who understands it, earns it; he who doesn't, pays it.
quote_cn: 复利是世界第八大奇迹。懂得复利的人赚取它，不懂的人则支付它。
author: Albert Einstein
title: Nobel Laureate in Physics

quote_en: If you have trouble imagining a 20% loss in the stock market, you shouldn't be in stocks.
quote_cn: 如果你很难想象股市下跌20%，你就不应该投资股票。
author: John Bogle
title: Founder, Vanguard Group

quote_en: Don't look for the needle in the haystack. Just buy the haystack!
quote_cn: 不要在草堆里找针，直接买下整个草堆！
author: John Bogle
title: Founder, Vanguard Group

quote_en: Every accomplishment starts with the decision to try.
quote_cn: 每一项成就都始于尝试的决定。
author: Li Ka-shing
title: Founder, CK Hutchison Holdings

quote_en: Before taking action, consider the consequences three times.
quote_cn: 行事之前，三思后行。
author: Li Ka-shing
title: Founder, CK Hutchison Holdings

quote_en: Give more than you take, and you will always have more than enough.
quote_cn: 付出多于索取，你就会永远绰绰有余。
author: Li Ka-shing
title: Founder, CK Hutchison Holdings

quote_en: Customers are the reason for our existence. Satisfying customers is the fundamental goal of our business.
quote_cn: 客户是我们存在的理由。满足客户是我们经营的根本目标。
author: Ren Zhengfei
title: Founder, Huawei

quote_en: A company that does not innovate will die. Innovation is our lifeline.
quote_cn: 不创新的企业将死亡。创新是我们的生命线。
author: Ren Zhengfei
title: Founder, Huawei

quote_en: Today is cruel, tomorrow is crueler, and the day after tomorrow is beautiful.
quote_cn: 今天很残酷，明天更残酷，后天很美好。
author: Jack Ma
title: Co-Founder, Alibaba Group
title_cn: 阿里巴巴集团联合创始人

quote_en: Never give up. Today is hard, tomorrow will be worse, but the day after tomorrow will be sunshine.
quote_cn: 永不放弃。今天很艰难，明天更艰难，但后天阳光灿烂。
author: Jack Ma
title: Co-Founder, Alibaba Group
title_cn: 阿里巴巴集团联合创始人

quote_en: If you don't give up, you still have a chance. Giving up is the greatest failure.
quote_cn: 只要不放弃，就还有机会。放弃才是最大的失败。
author: Jack Ma
title: Co-Founder, Alibaba Group
title_cn: 阿里巴巴集团联合创始人

quote_en: I believe that the real estate business is a sunrise industry. The market demand is enormous.
quote_cn: 我相信房地产是朝阳产业，市场需求巨大。
author: Wang Jianlin
title: Founder, Wanda Group

quote_en: Set a small goal first—for example, let's first make 100 million.
quote_cn: 先定一个小目标，比如先挣一个亿。
author: Wang Jianlin
title: Founder, Wanda Group

quote_en: Being right means nothing if you can't hold your position.
quote_cn: 如果你无法坚守仓位，判断正确也毫无意义。
author: Duan Yongping
title: Founder, BBK Electronics; Early Investor in Apple/OPPO
title_cn: 步步高电子创始人；苹果/OPPO早期投资人

quote_en: Do the right thing, do things right. These are the two most important principles in business.
quote_cn: 做正确的事，把事情做对。这是商业中最重要的两个原则。
author: Duan Yongping
title: Founder, BBK Electronics; Early Investor in Apple/OPPO
title_cn: 步步高电子创始人；苹果/OPPO早期投资人

quote_en: The stock market is designed to transfer money from the Active to the Patient.
quote_cn: 股市的设计是将钱从活跃者转移到耐心者手中。
author: Warren Buffett
title: CEO, Berkshire Hathaway

quote_en: In investing, what is comfortable is rarely profitable.
quote_cn: 在投资中，舒适的往往不是盈利的。
author: Robert Arnott
title: Founder, Research Affiliates

quote_en: Wide diversification is only required when investors do not understand what they are doing.
quote_cn: 只有当投资者不了解自己在做什么时，才需要广泛分散投资。
author: Warren Buffett
title: CEO, Berkshire Hathaway

quote_en: The market can stay irrational longer than you can stay solvent.
quote_cn: 市场保持非理性的时间，可以比你保持偿债能力的时间更长。
author: John Maynard Keynes
title: Economist

quote_en: The investor's chief problem—and even his worst enemy—is likely to be himself.
quote_cn: 投资者最大的问题——甚至是最大的敌人——很可能是他自己。
author: Benjamin Graham
title: Father of Value Investing

quote_en: Behind every stock is a company. Find out what it's doing.
quote_cn: 每只股票背后都有一家公司，找出它在做什么。
author: Peter Lynch
title: Former Manager, Magellan Fund

quote_en: Go for a business that any idiot can run—because sooner or later, any idiot probably is going to run it.
quote_cn: 选择任何蠢货都能经营的生意——因为迟早会有蠢货来经营它。
author: Peter Lynch
title: Former Manager, Magellan Fund

quote_en: Investment success accrues not so much to the brilliant as to the disciplined.
quote_cn: 投资成功不那么属于聪明人，而更多属于自律的人。
author: William Bernstein
title: Financial Theorist & Author

quote_en: The key to making money in stocks is not to get scared out of them.
quote_cn: 股票赚钱的关键，是不要被吓跑。
author: Peter Lynch
title: Former Manager, Magellan Fund
